shortDescription: Modern 2-bedroom suite in Yorkville with premium finishes and full building amenities.
fullDescription: Welcome to 1 Bedford Road, Unit PH02 in the vibrant Yorkville neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. All 2 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
In-suite laundry with full-size washer and dryer
